name: Between a Rock and a Hard Place - Bara Bear and Tiger
description:
Art by marius_tygo on Twitter. Original Characters by Ara__chibi on Twitter.

🐯 Bruce @BruceBeef · 11:03 AM
Train rides are boring as hell so me n’ Burley started a flex-off 💪🔥 loser buys drinks later.
📸 [Bruce flexing in his tanktop, Burley smirking in the background groping his pec]

↳ 🐻 Burley @BigBurleyBear · 11:04 AM
Bold of him to assume he’s not paying.
📸 [Burley’s seat POV: Bruce flexing but clearly trying not to laugh]

🐯 Bruce @BruceBeef · 11:08 AM
City boys keep staring lol. Old lady 2 seats down is tryna act like she ain’t looking 👀
📸 [close-up: their biceps side by side, Bruce’s striped arm popping, Burley’s white fur looking thick]

↳ 🐻 Burley @BigBurleyBear · 11:09 AM
City boys are staring at you, I’m just here looking pretty.
📸 [Burley’s POV: Bruce flexing hard, face scrunched up in effort]

🐯 Bruce @BruceBeef · 11:19 AM
One seat between us = danger zone. Sit here and you’re getting caught in the crossfire 💥
📸 [both leaning in, caps almost touching, the empty seat between them]

↳ 🐻 Burley @BigBurleyBear · 11:19 AM
Not danger zone. VIP zone.
📸 [Burley’s POV: the empty seat framed by both their thighs, Bruce mid-smirk]

🐯 Bruce @BruceBeef · 11:21 AM
funny how you’re still standing btw. seat’s open. just sayin.
📸 [blurry pic framed by Bruce’s arm and Burley’s shoulder, the empty seat dead center]

↳ 🐻 Burley @BigBurleyBear · 11:22 AM
I’ll even scoot over for you. But not too much.
📸 [Burley’s POV: angled up at the you, Bruce looking directly at the “camera” with a cocky grin]
